name: BUSTR: Descriptor-Aware Vision-Language Learning for Breast Ultrasound Report Generation

description: arXiv:2511.20956v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Breast ultrasound (BUS) reporting relies on clinically meaningful lesion descriptors, including BI-RADS category, lesion shape, margin, echogenicity, posterior features, pathology, and histology. However, many public BUS datasets provide structured annotations and lesion masks without paired radiologist-written reports, limiting the deve...
author: Rawa Mohammed, Mina Attin, Laxmi Gewali, Bryar Shareef
